use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ACUTE BACTERIAL SKIN AND SKIN STRUCTURE INFECTIONS CAUSED BY DESIGNATED SUSCEPTIBLE BACTERIA IN ADULTS

indications.text:
1.1 Acute Bacterial Skin and Skin Structure Infections
BAXDELA is indicated in adults for the treatment of acute bacterial skin and skin structure infections
(ABSSSI) caused by susceptible isolates of the following:
